documentation.file_docstring: Build a group message context where the user sends a message inside a forum topic that has `reply_to_message` pointing to a message from the bot.  Callers control whether the reply target looks like a forum service message (carries `forum_topic_created` etc.) or a real bot reply.

functions.name: buildGroupReplyCtx
functions.doc: Build a group message context where the user sends a message inside a     forum topic that has `reply_to_message` pointi
